result.markdown:
--- title: "Möjlighet att påverka" title-block-banner: "#009ca6" title-block-banner-color: "#FFFFFF" format: html execute: echo: true warning: false message: false cache: true editor_options: chunk_output_type: console --- ::: {.cell hash='03_mpvrk_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-1_7f31a22413df8aaf1b8b7d2fe2518aaf'} ```{.r .cell-code} library(foreign) library(readxl) library(RISEkbmRasch) # devtools::install_github("pgmj/RISEkbmRasch") library(grateful) # devtools::install_github("Pakillo/grateful") library(ggrepel) library(car) library(kableExtra) library(readxl) library(tidyverse) library(eRm) library(mirt) library(psych) library(ggplot2) library(psychotree) library(matrixStats) library(reshape) library(knitr) library(cowplot) library(formattable) library(glue) library(hexbin) library(skimr) ### some commands exist in multiple packages, here we define preferred ones that are frequently used select <- dplyr::select count <- dplyr::count recode <- car::recode rename <- dplyr::rename # file paths will need to have "../" added at the beginning to be able to render document # get itemlabels itemlabels <- read_excel("../data/Itemlabels.xlsx") %>% filter(str_detect(itemnr, pattern = "mp")) %>% select(!Dimension) spssDatafil <- "../data/2023-04-26 Prevent OSA-enkat.sav" # read SurveyMonkey data df <- read.spss(spssDatafil, to.data.frame = TRUE) %>% select(starts_with("q0007"),q0001,q0002,q0003,q0004) %>% rename(Kön = q0002, Ålder = q0001, Bransch = q0003, Hemarbete = q0004) # SPSS format provides itemlabels too, we can save them in a dataframe spssLabels <- df %>% attr('variable.labels') %>% as.data.frame() dif.kön <- df$Kön dif.ålder <- df$Ålder dif.bransch <- df$Bransch dif.hemarbete <- df$Hemarbete df <- df %>% select(starts_with("q0007")) names(df) <- itemlabels$itemnr ``` ::: ## Items ::: {.cell hash='03_mpvrk_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-2_5636e796429999ace79451956f4a09ba'} ```{.r .cell-code} itemlabels %>% kbl_rise(width = 60) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} `````{=html}
itemnr item
mp1 Jag har de resurser som behövs för att kunna utföra mina arbetsuppgifter.
mp2 Jag kan prioritera i vilken ordning mina arbetsuppgifter ska utföras.
mp3 Jag har tillräckligt med befogenheter för att kunna utföra mina arbetsuppgifter.
mp4 Jag kan påverka beslut som rör mina arbetsuppgifter.
mp5 Jag kan själv bestämma min arbetstakt.
````` ::: ::: ## Bakgrundsdata ::: panel-tabset ### Kön ::: {.cell hash='03_mpvrk_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-3_98c3387a1f6f823322d2fa95069a2361'} ```{.r .cell-code} RIdemographics(dif.kön,"Kön") ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} `````{=html}
Kön n Percent
Kvinna 402 69.7
Man 172 29.8
Annat 1 0.2
Vill ej uppge 2 0.3
````` ::: ::: ### Ålder ::: {.cell hash='03_mpvrk_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-4_5491c4a0f20b1b6af658d3c868299c47'} ```{.r .cell-code} RIdemographics(dif.ålder,"Ålder") # kanske även fixa en figur? ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} `````{=html}
Ålder n Percent
18-29 22 3.8
30-39 103 17.8
40-49 175 30.2
50-59 215 37.1
60+ 64 11.1
````` ::: ::: ### Bransch ::: {.cell hash='03_mpvrk_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-5_29494ce33987f80eba0956e6fd591c01'} ```{.r .cell-code} RIdemographics(dif.bransch,"Bransch") ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} `````{=html}
Bransch n Percent
Kontorsarbete (oavsett bransch) 284 49.1
Industri 26 4.5
Hotell, restaurang, service 8 1.4
Handel 16 2.8
Skola, utbildning 67 11.6
Vård, omsorg 99 17.1
Byggverksamhet 7 1.2
Annat 71 12.3
````` ::: ::: ### Arbete hemifrån ::: {.cell hash='03_mpvrk_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-6_59c00a86492324113d192f5d4c65d741'} ```{.r .cell-code} RIdemographics(dif.hemarbete,"Antal dagar med arbete hemifrån") ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} `````{=html}
Antal dagar med arbete hemifrån n Percent
En dag 136 23.5
Två dagar 105 18.1
Tre dagar 35 6.0
Fyra dagar 10 1.7
Fem dagar 2 0.3
Jag arbetar aldrig eller sällan hemifrån 291 50.3
````` ::: ::: ::: ### Svarsbortfall items Vi filtrerar bort respondenter som har färre än två svar på frågorna i delskalan. ::: {.cell hash='03_mpvrk_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-7_d54d93012a2d6ebbfb0b5587b50ec735'} ```{.r .cell-code} # If you want to include participants with missing data, input the minimum number of items responses that a participant should have to be included in the analysis: min.responses <- 2 scale.items <- itemlabels$itemnr # Select the variables we will work with, and filter out respondents with a lot of missing data df.omit.na <- df %>% filter(length(scale.items)-rowSums(is.na(.[scale.items])) >= min.responses) RImissing(df.omit.na,"mp") ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](03_mpvrk_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-7-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: Vi har extremt få saknade svar, och tar därför bort respondenter som inte har kompletta svar. ::: {.cell hash='03_mpvrk_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-8_f53c3e390077c63cf9cfe027c2cf26c6'} ```{.r .cell-code} df <- read.spss(spssDatafil, to.data.frame = TRUE) %>% select(starts_with("q0007"),q0001,q0002,q0003,q0004) %>% rename(Kön = q0002, Ålder = q0001, Bransch = q0003, Hemarbete = q0004) %>% na.omit() dif.kön <- df$Kön dif.ålder <- df$Ålder dif.bransch <- df$Bransch dif.hemarbete <- df$Hemarbete df <- df %>% select(starts_with("q0007")) names(df) <- itemlabels$itemnr df.omit.na <- df ``` ::: ### Alla svar för alla frågor ::: {.cell hash='03_mpvrk_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-9_4a4ee7025de1d913cbb45da868d5aa80'} ```{.r .cell-code} RIallresp(df.omit.na) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display}
Response category Number of responses Percent
Alltid 542 21.6
Mycket ofta 1011 40.3
Ganska ofta 588 23.4
Ibland 241 9.6
Sällan 106 4.2
Aldrig 22 0.9
::: ::: ::: {.cell hash='03_mpvrk_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-10_d3054419817bfa93927cf35f474a0136'} ```{.r .cell-code} # koda om svarskategorier till siffror df.omit.na <- df.omit.na %>% mutate(across(everything(), ~ car::recode(.x,"'Aldrig'=0; 'Sällan' =1; 'Ibland'=2; 'Ganska ofta'=3; 'Mycket ofta'=4; 'Alltid'=5", as.factor = FALSE))) ``` ::: ### Descriptives - all items ::: panel-tabset #### Tile plot ::: {.cell hash='03_mpvrk_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-11_1be9fb231c0134d0fad2e5ffdf9acccd'} ```{.r .cell-code} RItileplot(df.omit.na) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](03_mpvrk_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-11-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: #### Stacked bars ::: {.cell hash='03_mpvrk_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-12_704132572cc33d5e9504c5ff6047d327'} ```{.r .cell-code} RIbarstack(df.omit.na) + ylab("Item") ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](03_mpvrk_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-12-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: #### Barplots ::: {.cell layout-ncol="2" hash='03_mpvrk_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-13_590106fdbd082880461e27717fb48493'} ```{.r .cell-code} RIbarplot(df.omit.na) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](03_mpvrk_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-13-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](03_mpvrk_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-13-2.png){width=672} ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](03_mpvrk_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-13-3.png){width=672} ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](03_mpvrk_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-13-4.png){width=672} ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](03_mpvrk_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-13-5.png){width=672} ::: ::: ::: Vi har väldigt få svar i lägsta svarskategorierna, speciellt för item mp1 och mp3. Vi slår därför ihop de två lägsta svarskategorierna för mp1 och mp3. ::: {.cell hash='03_mpvrk_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-14_6d43eba4148f3d477d10b47be8bbfbd9'} ```{.r .cell-code} df.omit.na$mp1<-recode(df.omit.na$mp1,"1=0;2=1;3=2;4=3;5=4",as.factor=FALSE) df.omit.na$mp3<-recode(df.omit.na$mp3,"1=0;2=1;3=2;4=3;5=4",as.factor=FALSE) ``` ::: ## Rasch-analys 1 ::: {.cell .column-margin hash='03_mpvrk_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-15_0712c7fca1ae87bab31856581e241b78'} ::: {.cell-output-display}
itemnr item
mp1 Jag har de resurser som behövs för att kunna utföra mina arbetsuppgifter.
mp2 Jag kan prioritera i vilken ordning mina arbetsuppgifter ska utföras.
mp3 Jag har tillräckligt med befogenheter för att kunna utföra mina arbetsuppgifter.
mp4 Jag kan påverka beslut som rör mina arbetsuppgifter.
mp5 Jag kan själv bestämma min arbetstakt.
::: ::: ::: panel-tabset ### Item fit ::: {.cell hash='03_mpvrk_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-16_ed6898902bac4e04782a1ced997c913d'} ```{.r .cell-code} RIitemfitPCM2(df.omit.na, samplesize = 250, nsamples = 32, cpu = 8) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} `````{=html}
OutfitMSQ InfitMSQ OutfitZSTD InfitZSTD
mp1 0.925 0.884 -0.698 -1.079
mp2 0.842 0.819 -1.683 -1.961
mp3 0.817 0.84 -1.88 -1.709
mp4 0.691 0.696 -3.581 -3.377
mp5 0.824 0.822 -2.019 -2.032
````` ::: ::: ### PCA ::: {.cell tbl-cap='PCA of Rasch model residuals' hash='03_mpvrk_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-17_99e74229f695f6f48ffe810a5c87e7db'} ```{.r .cell-code} RIpcmPCA(na.omit(df.omit.na)) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} `````{=html}
Eigenvalues
1.71
1.27
1.21
0.81
0.00
````` ::: ::: ### Residual correlations ::: {.cell hash='03_mpvrk_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-18_69551acfab5b4237c19a4f94dc1493ed'} ```{.r .cell-code} RIresidcorr(df.omit.na, cutoff = 0.2) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} `````{=html}
mp1 mp2 mp3 mp4 mp5
mp1
mp2 -0.17
mp3 -0.23 -0.21
mp4 -0.32 -0.35 0.12
mp5 -0.15 -0.1 -0.48 -0.23
Note:
Relative cut-off value (highlighted in red) is -0.012, which is 0.2 above the average correlation.
````` ::: ::: ### 1st contrast loadings ::: {.cell hash='03_mpvrk_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-19_3dcd8163b84e924c2762fa47656625ec'} ```{.r .cell-code} RIloadLoc(df.omit.na) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](03_mpvrk_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-19-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: ### Analysis of response categories ::: {.cell layout-ncol="2" hash='03_mpvrk_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-20_5dd87c3ba9485b47ed34331a42279beb'} ```{.r .cell-code} RIitemCats(df.omit.na, items = "all") ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](03_mpvrk_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-20-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](03_mpvrk_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-20-2.png){width=672} ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](03_mpvrk_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-20-3.png){width=672} ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](03_mpvrk_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-20-4.png){width=672} ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](03_mpvrk_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-20-5.png){width=672} ::: ::: ### Targeting ::: {.cell hash='03_mpvrk_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-21_dd99c84af793438d794ac3d2bbd1f66f'} ```{.r .cell-code} # increase fig-height above as needed, if you have many items RItargeting(df.omit.na, xlim = c(-5,5)) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](03_mpvrk_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-21-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: ### Item hierarchy ::: {.cell hash='03_mpvrk_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-22_b701f3e16f470dd002e627e84af51a38'} ```{.r .cell-code} RIitemHierarchy(df.omit.na) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](03_mpvrk_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-22-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: ::: Det finns en residualkorrelation mellan mp3 och mp4 långt över det rekommenderade tröskelvärdet. Eftersom mp4 visar låg item fit exkluderas detta item från fortsatta analyser. Det finns problem med oordnade svarskategorier. Vi slår samman de två lägsta svarskategorierna (T1 och T2 i targeting-figuren) för item 2 och de två näst lägsta (T2 och T3) för item 5. ::: {.cell hash='03_mpvrk_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-23_a329199d66e9024802b8fb5f22c714cf'} ```{.r .cell-code} # create vector with eliminated items removed_items <- c("mp4") df.omit.na$mp2<-recode(df.omit.na$mp2,"1=0;2=1;3=2;4=3;5=4",as.factor=FALSE) df.omit.na$mp5<-recode(df.omit.na$mp5,"2=1;3=2;4=3;5=4",as.factor=FALSE) # select all items except those removed df2 <- df.omit.na %>% select(!any_of(removed_items)) ``` ::: ### Analysis of response categories ::: {.cell layout-ncol="2" hash='03_mpvrk_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-24_286ec029511957164846bcca2657bfca'} ```{.r .cell-code} RIitemCats(df2, items = "all") ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](03_mpvrk_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-24-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](03_mpvrk_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-24-2.png){width=672} ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](03_mpvrk_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-24-3.png){width=672} ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](03_mpvrk_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-24-4.png){width=672} ::: ::: ## Rasch-analys 2 ::: {.cell .column-margin hash='03_mpvrk_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-25_451cdb75460e8351647460d2715657f4'} ::: {.cell-output-display}
itemnr item
mp1 Jag har de resurser som behövs för att kunna utföra mina arbetsuppgifter.
mp2 Jag kan prioritera i vilken ordning mina arbetsuppgifter ska utföras.
mp3 Jag har tillräckligt med befogenheter för att kunna utföra mina arbetsuppgifter.
mp5 Jag kan själv bestämma min arbetstakt.
::: ::: ::: panel-tabset ### Item fit ::: {.cell hash='03_mpvrk_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-26_aea06f70af9b9d68fcc886224e9a907b'} ```{.r .cell-code} RIitemfitPCM(df2, samplesize = 250, nsamples = 32) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} `````{=html}
OutfitMSQ InfitMSQ OutfitZSTD InfitZSTD
mp1 0.792 0.756 -2.42 -2.948
mp2 0.718 0.71 -3.268 -3.282
mp3 0.903 0.887 -0.999 -1.202
mp5 0.725 0.707 -3.384 -3.669
````` ::: ::: ### PCA ::: {.cell tbl-cap='PCA of Rasch model residuals' hash='03_mpvrk_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-27_8b6938c1dcb22b31f408fdc3e8e42ac8'} ```{.r .cell-code} RIpcmPCA(na.omit(df2)) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} `````{=html}
Eigenvalues
1.45
1.39
1.15
0.01
````` ::: ::: ### Residual correlations ::: {.cell hash='03_mpvrk_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-28_146023545eb47246cb17afdcd3b41977'} ```{.r .cell-code} RIresidcorr(df2, cutoff = 0.2) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} `````{=html}
mp1 mp2 mp3 mp5
mp1
mp2 -0.32
mp3 -0.28 -0.26
mp5 -0.19 -0.14 -0.39
Note:
Relative cut-off value (highlighted in red) is -0.064, which is 0.2 above the average correlation.
````` ::: ::: ### 1st contrast loadings ::: {.cell hash='03_mpvrk_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-29_8a9a20cd52e2fd2cce27661c1c505f4a'} ```{.r .cell-code} RIloadLoc(df2) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](03_mpvrk_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-29-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: ### Targeting ::: {.cell hash='03_mpvrk_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-30_89873204bc6603184724cafe9059df9e'} ```{.r .cell-code} # increase fig-height above as needed, if you have many items RItargeting(df2) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](03_mpvrk_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-30-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: ### Item hierarchy ::: {.cell hash='03_mpvrk_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-31_03a7be931147bdeb71ab47235395ea1d'} ```{.r .cell-code} RIitemHierarchy(df2) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](03_mpvrk_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-31-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: ::: ### Targeting ::: {.cell hash='03_mpvrk_cache/html/fig-mpvrk-targ_9382198afe8e01ebd5a03a7e5b20f53c'} ```{.r .cell-code} # increase fig-height above as needed, if you have many items RItargeting(df2) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![Targeting för området Möjlighet att påverka](03_mpvrk_files/figure-html/fig-mpvrk-targ-1.png){#fig-mpvrk-targ width=672} ::: ::: Det finns inte längre något problem med residualkorrelationer. Flera items (mp1, mp2 och mp5) har något låg ZSTD item, medan MSQ ser ok ut. Vi går vidare och undersöker DIF och reliabilitet. ## DIF-analysis En DIF-analys bör inte inkludera svarskategorier med för få svar. Därför har svarskategorier med färre än 50 svar antingen exkluderas eller slagits ihop med andra svarskategorier (se avsnittet om bakgrundsdata för exakt antal svar per ordinarie kategori). DIF-variablerna omkodades till att innehålla följande kategorier: - Kön: man, kvinna - Ålder: 30-39, 40-49, 50-59, 60+ - Bransch: kontorsarbete, ej kontorsarbete - Hemarbete: aldrig eller sällan, en dag, minst två dagar Koden nedan specificerar exakt hur omkodningen gick till. ::: {.cell hash='03_mpvrk_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-33_abeec430104c89bf85b5cf06e45785d3'} ```{.r .cell-code} # Omkodning för kön dif.kön <- recode(dif.kön,"'Annat'=NA;'Vill ej uppge'=NA") # Omkodning för ålder dif.ålder <- recode(dif.ålder,"'18-29'=NA") # Omkodning för bransch dif.bransch <- recode(dif.bransch,"'Industri'='Ej kontorsarbete';'Hotell, restaurang, service'='Ej kontorsarbete';'Handel'='Ej kontorsarbete';'Skola, utbildning'='Ej kontorsarbete';'Vård, omsorg'='Ej kontorsarbete';'Byggverksamhet'='Ej kontorsarbete';'Annat'='Ej kontorsarbete'") #Omkodning för hemarbete dif.hemarbete <- recode(dif.hemarbete,"'Fem dagar'='Minst två dagar';'Fyra dagar'='Minst två dagar';'Tre dagar'='Minst två dagar';'Två dagar'='Minst två dagar'") ``` ::: ::: panel-tabset ### Gender ::: {.cell hash='03_mpvrk_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-34_dbba0db3ec5dc1ff477882aea132707d'} ```{.r .cell-code} RIdifTable(df2, dif.kön) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [1] "No significant DIF found." ``` ::: ::: ### Age ::: {.cell hash='03_mpvrk_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-35_f52edd7eb54bd7a5c6b9a522378e9cb2'} ```{.r .cell-code} RIdifTable(df2, dif.ålder) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [1] "No significant DIF found." ``` ::: ::: ### Bransch ::: {.cell hash='03_mpvrk_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-36_a344de0dbb4c758fd3a73ffaf0c32d73'} ```{.r .cell-code} RIdifTable(df2, dif.bransch) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [1] "No significant DIF found." ``` ::: ::: ### Hemarbete ::: {.cell hash='03_mpvrk_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-37_56f25ae8bdad9e43a3b5a16f46161d07'} ```{.r .cell-code} RIdifTable(df2, dif.hemarbete) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [1] "No significant DIF found." ``` ::: ::: ::: Inga problem i DIF-analysen baserat på kön, ålder, bransch eller hemarbete. ## Reliability ::: {.cell hash='03_mpvrk_cache/html/fig-mpvrk-rel_51eb00545b0760b1385a29c4ebd816ac'} ```{.r .cell-code} RItif(df2, lo = -5, hi = 5) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![Reliabilitet för området Möjlighet att påverka](03_mpvrk_files/figure-html/fig-mpvrk-rel-1.png){#fig-mpvrk-rel width=672} ::: ::: Reliabiliteten kommer inte riktigt upp i önskad nivå, men eftersom det avsedda användningsområdet enbart är på gruppnivå kan detta vara tillräckligt nära. ## Person fit ::: {.cell hash='03_mpvrk_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-39_e1ca359edb73463e0fb42e23e1aab3c8'} ```{.r .cell-code} RIpfit(df2) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](03_mpvrk_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-39-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](03_mpvrk_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-39-2.png){width=672} ::: ::: ## Item-parametrar ::: {.cell hash='03_mpvrk_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-40_4e58add26ba1145cc18aa1fd8e0ed9e3'} ```{.r .cell-code} RIitemparams(df2) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} `````{=html}
Threshold 1 Threshold 2 Threshold 3 Threshold 4 Item location
mp1 -0.86 0.04 1.21 3.96 1.09
mp2 -1.33 -0.13 0.84 3.33 0.68
mp3 -0.82 -0.62 0.43 2.63 0.4
mp5 -2.37 0.70 1.46 3.75 0.88
````` ::: ::: ## Transformeringstabell ::: {.cell hash='03_mpvrk_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-41_e8408a1e50458f00e76e1c03a7acf615'} ```{.r .cell-code} RIscoreSE(df2) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display}
Ordinal sum score Logit score Logit std.error

11 1.78 0.70

13 2.92 0.82

15 4.65 1.13
16 5.71 NA
::: ::: ### Estimering av mätvärden ::: {.cell hash='03_mpvrk_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-42_ff366a354f97b2936faf6287f56c9226'} ```{.r .cell-code} df2$score <- RIestThetas(df2) write.csv(df2, "scored.csv") summary(df2$score) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` Min. 1st Qu. Median Mean 3rd Qu. Max. -2.3163 0.8879 1.7096 1.7319 2.8383 4.0000 ``` ::: ::: ::: {.cell hash='03_mpvrk_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-43_60285802e728ff43726986587bb422e8'} ```{.r .cell-code} ggplot( data = df2, aes(x = score, y = 0, fill = factor(score)) ) + geom_dotplot(color = "white", dotsize = 1, binwidth = 0.12) + # plot mean value geom_point( aes( x = mean(score), y = 0 ), size = 6, shape = 18, color = "black" ) + # errorbar has brackets at the endpoints geom_errorbar( aes( xmin = mean(score) - sd(score), xmax = mean(score) + sd(score), y = 0, width = 0.025 ), color = "black" ) + theme_minimal(base_family = "Lato") + theme_rise() + coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-4,4)) + scale_color_viridis_d("Antal svar", begin = 0.2, aesthetics = c("fill", "color"), guide = "none" ) + labs( title = "Mätvärden", subtitle = "Värden längre till höger är bättre", caption = "Svart diamant indikerar medelvärde, strecken runt indikerar en standardavvikelse.", y = "Antal respondenter", x = "Mätvärden" ) + theme( #axis.text.x = element_blank(), # remove text from both axes axis.text.y = element_blank() ) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](03_mpvrk_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-43-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: ## Rekommenderade items ::: {.cell hash='03_mpvrk_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-44_47c60728761b3af76c5400ae438af4c3'} ```{.r .cell-code} itemlabels %>% filter(itemnr %in% names(df2)) %>% write_csv("finalItems.csv") itemlabels %>% filter(!itemnr %in% names(df2)) %>% write_csv("removedItems.csv") itemlabels %>% kbl_rise(width = 50, options = "hover") %>% row_spec(c(4), background = "lightpink") %>% footnote(general_title = "Notera: ", "Borttagna item markerade med färg.") ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} `````{=html}
itemnr item
mp1 Jag har de resurser som behövs för att kunna utföra mina arbetsuppgifter.
mp2 Jag kan prioritera i vilken ordning mina arbetsuppgifter ska utföras.
mp3 Jag har tillräckligt med befogenheter för att kunna utföra mina arbetsuppgifter.

````` ::: ::: ### Förändringar i svarskategorier ::: {.cell hash='03_mpvrk_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-45_bca0db7c44ae767788529be6b90e15bc'} ```{.r .cell-code} df.omit.na$mp1<-recode(df.omit.na$mp1,"1=0;2=1;3=2;4=3;5=4",as.factor=FALSE) df.omit.na$mp3<-recode(df.omit.na$mp3,"1=0;2=1;3=2;4=3;5=4",as.factor=FALSE) df.omit.na$mp2<-recode(df.omit.na$mp2,"1=0;2=1;3=2;4=3;5=4",as.factor=FALSE) df.omit.na$mp5<-recode(df.omit.na$mp5,"2=1;3=2;4=3;5=4",as.factor=FALSE) ``` :::
